_comment: Maps Madalena's design floor-plan zones to REAL backend screen ids and Hue light ids. Verified empirically 2026-06-12: screens by displaying their id on the physical display; lights by turning each on in a distinct colour and having the operator report the zone. IMPORTANT: backend screen *names* do NOT match physical zones (e.g. screen id 3 'Station 3' is physically in zone b 'Station 1') — trust this map. 'orientation' = physical display rotation. light_ids = Hue light ids (group 81 'Studio' spots 10-22; group 2 'Maker' strips 5,7,8,9).

wardrobe.name: Wardrobe
wardrobe._note: the 4 Maker-group light-strips; labeled area on the floor plan, not one of the 9 controllable popup zones

_open_items.zone_c_lights: Station 2 (c) has no Hue spot mapped — may genuinely have none, or revisit.
_open_items.main_hall_screen: Zone d 'screen 9' is offline — capture its backend id when powered on.
_open_items.offline_screens: Backend screens 6 (Main Screen) and 7 (Screen 4) were offline during mapping — physical zone unknown.
